articles.title: Anatomy of a seafloor spreading event captured by in situ seismogeodesy - Nature
articles.description: By combining hydroacoustic, direct-path ranging and bottom-pressure measurements, in situ observations of a rifting event at a segment of the Southeast Indian Ridge are reported, providing insight into seafloor spreading events on yearly timescales.
articles.content:
<li>Macdonald, K. C. Mid-ocean ridges: fine scale tectonic, volcanic and hydrothermal processes within the plate boundary zone. Annu. Rev. Earth Planet. Sci.10, 155190 (1982).
